name: java-context-switcher
description: Switch between Java versions via a localhost web UI

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
